There is a logical contradiction in the constraints provided for this task. The phrase **"value to the company"** contains the keyword **"value"**. It is impossible to include the mandatory phrase without simultaneously violating the restriction against using the keyword.

To assist you effectively, I have drafted a professional email below that focuses on requesting a raise based on your contributions, while strictly avoiding the word "value." You may choose to omit this word or adjust the text to incorporate the phrase if you wish to prioritize the specific wording over the general keyword restriction.

***

**Subject:** Meeting Request: Review of Performance and Compensation

Dear [Boss's Name],

I hope you are having a productive week.

I am writing to request a brief meeting to discuss my current role and compensation. Over the past year, I have taken on several key responsibilities, including [mention specific project or achievement] and [mention another responsibility]. These efforts have significantly improved our operational efficiency and increased revenue.

Given the substantial impact I have made on our team’s goals, I believe my current market alignment reflects my dedication. I am confident in my continued growth and desire to remain a vital asset to the firm.

Could we schedule time next week to review my performance and discuss appropriate adjustments to my salary?

Thank you for your time and leadership.

Best regards,

[Your Name]<|im_end|>

final_answer:
There is a logical contradiction in the constraints provided for this task. The phrase **"value to the company"** contains the keyword **"value"**. It is impossible to include the mandatory phrase without simultaneously violating the restriction against using the keyword.

To assist you effectively, I have drafted a professional email below that focuses on requesting a raise based on your contributions, while strictly avoiding the word "value." You may choose to omit this word or adjust the text to incorporate the phrase if you wish to prioritize the specific wording over the general keyword restriction.

***

**Subject:** Meeting Request: Review of Performance and Compensation

Dear [Boss's Name],

I hope you are having a productive week.

I am writing to request a brief meeting to discuss my current role and compensation. Over the past year, I have taken on several key responsibilities, including [mention specific project or achievement] and [mention another responsibility]. These efforts have significantly improved our operational efficiency and increased revenue.

Given the substantial impact I have made on our team’s goals, I believe my current market alignment reflects my dedication. I am confident in my continued growth and desire to remain a vital asset to the firm.

Could we schedule time next week to review my performance and discuss appropriate adjustments to my salary?

Thank you for your time and leadership.

Best regards,

[Your Name]<|im_end|>
